data.title: XT officially launched Binance Life USD-margined perpetual contracts, supporting 50x leverage and one-click copy trading.
data.description: XT exchange officially launched Binance Life USD-margined perpetual contracts on January 15, 2026 at 16:00 (UTC+8). Key features include: Leverage: Supports flexible adjustment from 1-50x. Special functions: Full support for lead trading, allowing novice or strategic users to easily follow experienced traders. Trading pair: Binance Life USDT

data.title: Gate has launched perpetual contract trading on Snowball.
data.description: According to official sources, Gate.com has launched perpetual contract trading on Snowball (USDT settlement), supporting leverage from 1x to 20x. It is also now available on Gate Perp DEX.

data.title: Avici launches virtual account functionality on Solana, supporting automatic fiat-to-stablecoin conversion.
data.description: SolanaFloor announced on the X platform that Avici has launched a named virtual account feature on Solana, providing users with personal accounts and International Bank Accounts (IBANs) for receiving fiat currency. Funds sent will be automatically converted into stablecoins and credited to the user's self-custodied wallet.

data.title: London Stock Exchange launches digital clearing centre
data.description: The London Stock Exchange Group has launched its Digital Clearing Centre (LSEG DiSH), enabling programmatic instant settlement between independent on-chain and off-chain payment networks. Through commercial bank deposits stored on the DiSH ledger (DiSH Cash), the service allows for the instant 24/7 movement of commercial bank funds across multiple currencies and jurisdictions, including PVP and DVP.

data.title: Germany’s second-largest bank launches digital asset trading for retail clients
data.description:
DZ Bank obtains a MiCA license and prepares to enable access to cryptocurrencies through the meinKrypto platform.
source: https://atlas21.com/germanys-second-largest-bank-launches-digital-asset-trading-for-retail-clients/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=germanys-second-largest-bank-launches-digital-asset-trading-for-retail-clients

data.title: Binance Completes Frax Share Mainnet Swap and Rebranding
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has successfully completed the mainnet swap and rebranding of Frax Share (FXS) to Frax (FRAX). As part of this transition, deposits and withdrawals for the newly rebranded FRAX tokens are now available. Additionally, spot trading for the FRAX/USDT pair commenced on 2026-01-15 at 08:00 (UTC).

For users engaged in Spot Copy Trading, the FRAX/USDT pair can be added to their portfolios by adjusting the settings in the Personal Pair Preference section. The distribution of the new tokens was executed at a 1:1 ratio, meaning each FXS token was exchanged for one FRAX token. Users can review their token distribution history through their accounts.

The platform allows users to deposit old FXS tokens, both BEP20 and ERC20, and convert them to the new FRAX tokens at a 1:1 ratio using the Convert function. However, Binance has indicated that the option to deposit and convert old FXS tokens may be discontinued without prior notice. Furthermore, withdrawals of the old FXS tokens are no longer supported. Users are encouraged to stay informed about these changes to ensure a smooth transition to the new token system.

data.title: Binance Alpha listed on Xueqiu and Life K-line
data.description: According to the official interface, Binance Alpha has listed Xueqiu and Rensheng K-line. Xueqiu's market capitalization is currently $22.4 million, up 97% in the last 24 hours; Rensheng K-line's market capitalization is currently $8.11 million, up over 100% in a short period.

data.title: Snowball's market value surpasses $30 million
data.description: Market data shows that the market capitalization of BSC Meme coin on Xueqiu has exceeded $30 million, currently trading at $31.15 million.

data.title: China’s Digital Yuan Architect Accused of $8M Crypto Bribery Scheme
data.description:
Yao Qian, the former architect of China's digital yuan, accepted cryptocurrency bribes exceeding $8 million through hardware wallets and shell accounts while holding senior regulatory positions, with blockchain transparency ultimately exposing the elaborate corruption scheme that investigators traced through multiple layers of anonymous transfers.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/chinas-digital-yuan-architect-accused-of-8m-crypto-bribery-scheme/

data.title: The whistleblower who leaked information about the Venezuela incident has been arrested, and related insider accounts on Polymarket may be deleted.
data.description: Trump stated that the whistleblower who leaked information about Venezuela has been arrested and may face long-term imprisonment. Furthermore, Polymarket data shows that one of the three Venezuelan insider accounts listed on Polymarket is no longer accessible; its last activity was 11 days ago. Previous article: "When War is Settled Before News: How Prediction Markets 'Priced' Maduro's Arrests 6 Days in Advance"

data.title: Privacy Cash launches privacy redemption feature on Solana
data.description: Privacy Cash has launched a privacy-based exchange feature on Solana, allowing users to exchange for supported tokens without exposing their main wallet's on-chain records. The exchange process is conducted through a temporary client wallet, and after the exchange is executed by Jupiter, the funds are shielded again and returned to the user's wallet.

data.title: Crypto slump hits ARK ETFs in Q4, Coinbase becomes top detractor
data.description:
A fourth-quarter crypto downturn exposed how closely ARK’s flagship ETFs are now tied to digital assets, with Coinbase and Roblox emerging as the biggest performance drags.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-market-slide-hits-ark-etfs-coinbase-roblox-drag?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: World Liberty Files for US Bank Charter to Onshore USD1 Stablecoin
data.description:
Trump-backed World Liberty Financial seeks a US bank charter to fully onshore its USD1 stablecoin and offer issuance, custody, and conversion under federal oversight.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/world-liberty-files-for-us-bank-charter-to-onshore-usd1-stablecoin/

data.title: Bitcoin Fear & Greed Index Turns ‘Neutral’ For First Time Since October
data.description:
Sentiment in the Bitcoin market has marked an improvement recently as the Fear & Greed Index has surged into the neutral zone for the first time in months. Bitcoin Fear & Greed Index Is Now Pointing At ‘Neutral’ The “Fear & Greed Index” refers to an indicator created by Alternative that tells us about the average sentiment present among traders in the Bitcoin and wider cryptocurrency markets. It determines the investor mentality using the data of five factors: market cap dominance, trading volume, volatility, social media sentiment, and Google Trends. To represent the sentiment, the index makes use of a numerical scale running from 0 to 100
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-fear-greed-index-neutral-first-time-october/

data.title: Crypto Trader Unveils Massive $400,000 Bitcoin Price Target, Says BTC Mirroring Legendary Technical Pattern
data.description:
A widely followed crypto analyst says that Bitcoin (BTC) may be printing a years-long massive bullish pattern. The pseudonymous crypto trader Kaleo tells his 729,700 followers on X that Bitcoin may ultimately reach about $400,000 in 2028 before correcting.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/01/15/crypto-trader-unveils-massive-400000-bitcoin-price-target-says-btc-mirroring-legendary-technical-pattern/

data.title: STH Down 3%: $100K Level to Become a Wall of Resistance
data.description:
BTC price is below the average purchase price of short-term investors, putting them at a loss. Both charts show the same picture: when price approaches the STH breakeven point, the market will face a wave of sellers looking to exit at zero.
source: https://axeladlerjr.com/sth-down-3-100k-level-to-become-a-wall-of-resistance/
